import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from services.content_extraction import parse_item_content, _parse_vtt_text, _find_video_companion_text
from pathlib import Path
import tempfile, os

# Test _parse_vtt_text
with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile\('w', suffix='.vtt', delete=False\) as f:
    f.write\('''WEBVTT

1
00:00:01.000 --> 00:00:03.000
<c>Hello</c> world

2
00:00:03.000 --> 00:00:05.000
Hello world

3
00:00:05.000 --> 00:00:07.000
This is a test
'''\)
    vtt_path = Path\(f.name\)

text = _parse_vtt_text\(vtt_path\)
print\('VTT parse result:', repr\(text\)\)
vtt_path.unlink\(\)

# Test _find_video_companion_text with no companion
with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory\(\) as d:
    video = Path\(d\) / 'video_000.mp4'
    video.touch\(\)
    t, s = _find_video_companion_text\(video\)
    print\('No companion:', repr\(\(t, s\)\)\)
    
    # With subtitle
    \(Path\(d\) / 'video_000.subtitle.txt'\).write_text\('大家好\\n今天我们来聊聊...'\)
    t, s = _find_video_companion_text\(video\)
    print\('With subtitle:', repr\(\(t[:20], s\)\)\)
print\('All checks passed'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(venv/bin/python3.11 -c "
import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from services.downloader import _parse_vtt_text, _save_subtitle_companion
from services.content_extraction import _find_video_companion_text, _transcribe_video_with_whisper
from pathlib import Path
import tempfile

# Test _parse_vtt_text
with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile\('w', suffix='.vtt', delete=False, encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    f.write\('WEBVTT\\n\\n1\\n00:00:01.000 --> 00:00:03.000\\n<c>Hello</c> world\\n\\n2\\n00:00:03.000 --> 00:00:05.000\\nHello world\\n\\n3\\n00:00:05.000 --> 00:00:07.000\\nThis is a test\\n'\)
    vtt_path = Path\(f.name\)

text = _parse_vtt_text\(vtt_path\)
print\('VTT parse \(dedup\):', repr\(text\)\)
assert text == 'Hello world\\nThis is a test', repr\(text\)
vtt_path.unlink\(\)

# Test _find_video_companion_text
with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory\(\) as d:
    video = Path\(d\) / 'video_000.mp4'
    video.touch\(\)
    t, s = _find_video_companion_text\(video\)
    assert \(t, s\) == \('', ''\), \(t, s\)
    
    \(Path\(d\) / 'video_000.subtitle.txt'\).write_text\('大家好\\n今天我们来聊聊', encoding='utf-8'\)
    t, s = _find_video_companion_text\(video\)
    assert s == 'subtitle', s
    assert '大家好' in t

print\('All checks passed'\)
" 2>&1)

import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, "."\)
from database import SessionLocal
from models import Item, Media

db = SessionLocal\(\)
# 找有视频、且视频有音轨的 item
items = db.query\(Item\).join\(Media, Item.id == Media.item_id\).filter\(
    Media.type == "video",
    Media.local_path != ""
\).limit\(20\).all\(\)

for item in items:
    vids = [m for m in item.media if m.type == "video" and m.local_path]
    if vids:
        print\(f"id={item.id!r} title={item.title[:40]!r} video={vids[0].local_path}"\)
db.close\(\)
EOF)

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/items/9342f1c4-d162-4af7-a1d1-0ce2fd571f4a/parse-content" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ec_token" 2>&1 | venv/bin/python -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\('parse_status:', d.get\('parse_status'\)\)
et = d.get\('extracted_text',''\)
# Show which sections are present
for tag in ['detected_title', 'urls', 'ocr_text', 'subtitle_text', 'transcript_text']:
    present = '[' + tag + ']' in et
    print\(f'  [{tag}]: {present}'\)
# Show transcript preview
for section in et.split\('[transcript_text]'\):
    pass
last = et.split\('[transcript_text]'\)[-1] if '[transcript_text]' in et else ''
if last:
    print\('transcript preview:', last.strip\(\)[:200]\)
sub = et.split\('[subtitle_text]'\)[-1].split\('['\)[0] if '[subtitle_text]' in et else ''
if sub:
    print\('subtitle preview:', sub.strip\(\)[:200]\)
")

import sys, asyncio; sys.path.insert\(0, "."\)
from pathlib import Path
from services.downloader import _fetch_subtitles_only_sync, _save_subtitle_companion

# 模拟: 用一个有字幕的视频测试单独字幕抓取
# 先看看有没有 referer \(source_url\) 是抖音的 item
from database import SessionLocal
from models import Item, Media
db = SessionLocal\(\)
items = db.query\(Item\).filter\(
    Item.source_url.like\("%douyin%"\) | Item.source_url.like\("%xhslink%"\)
\).join\(Media, Item.id == Media.item_id\).filter\(
    Media.type == "video", Media.local_path != ""
\).limit\(5\).all\(\)
for item in items:
    vids = [m for m in item.media if m.type == "video" and m.local_path]
    if vids:
        print\(f"id={item.id[:8]} url={item.source_url[:60]} video={vids[0].local_path}"\)
db.close\(\)
EOF)

Bash(venv/bin/python - <<'EOF'
import sys, os; sys.path.insert\(0, "."\)
from pathlib import Path
from services.downloader import _fetch_subtitles_only_sync

# 用小视频测试: 从抖音分享页单独拉字幕
video_path = Path\("static/media/users/local-default-user/c8df72cb-399c-477a-8749-c1cc6f462ff4/video_000.mp4"\)
referer = "https://v.douyin.com/haeHGXC2zgE/"

# 清掉旧缓存
for f in video_path.parent.glob\("*.subtitle.txt"\):
    f.unlink\(\)
for f in video_path.parent.glob\("*.transcript.txt"\):
    f.unlink\(\)

print\("Before:", list\(video_path.parent.glob\("*.txt"\)\)\)

# 尝试从分享页抓字幕 \(skip_download=True\)
_fetch_subtitles_only_sync\(referer, video_path, referer=referer\)

# 检查结果
txts = list\(video_path.parent.glob\("*.txt"\)\)
print\("After:", txts\)
for t in txts:
    content = t.read_text\(\)
    print\(f"\\n=== {t.name} \({len\(content\)} chars\) ==="\)
    print\(content[:300]\)
EOF)

import sys, os, time; sys.path.insert\(0, "."\)
os.environ["PATH"] = "/opt/homebrew/bin:" + os.environ.get\("PATH", ""\)

video = "static/media/users/local-default-user/c8df72cb-399c-477a-8749-c1cc6f462ff4/video_000.mp4"
import mlx_whisper

# base + language=zh + condition_on_previous_text=False \(faster\)
t0 = time.time\(\)
r = mlx_whisper.transcribe\(
    video,
    path_or_hf_repo="mlx-community/whisper-base-mlx",
    language="zh",
    condition_on_previous_text=False,
\)
t1 = time.time\(\)
print\(f"whisper-base \(zh, fast\): {t1-t0:.1f}s"\)
print\(f"text: {r.get\('text',''\)[:300]}"\)
print\(\)

# small + same optimizations for comparison
t2 = time.time\(\)
r2 = mlx_whisper.transcribe\(
    video,
    path_or_hf_repo="mlx-community/whisper-small-mlx",
    language="zh",
    condition_on_previous_text=False,
\)
t3 = time.time\(\)
print\(f"whisper-small \(zh, fast\): {t3-t2:.1f}s"\)
print\(f"text: {r2.get\('text',''\)[:300]}"\)
EOF)
